message: Controlled generation gate is ready for review.

preview.summary: This will prepare Kyiv Realty as a Real Estate site based on the supported deterministic baseline.

diff_summary.note: This is a proposal preview only. Runtime diff will be computed during controlled generate or dry-run later.

create_preview.label: Kyiv Realty
create_preview.message: Create the Kyiv Realty page as part of the generated Real Estate site.

update_preview.label: Site identity
update_preview.message: Use "Kyiv Realty" as the planned site identity for the generated Real Estate experience.

skip_preview.label: Plugins
skip_preview.message: This preview describes plugins conceptually but does not compute a runtime diff for it yet.

optional_features.note: Optional filtering enhancements remain available when the runtime dependency is installed.
Optional form enhancements remain available when the runtime dependency is installed.

risks: Runtime dependency status is not verified by this preview endpoint.
warnings: Preview only. No site changes were made.

required_dependencies.name: WordPress
required_dependencies.note: A working WordPress runtime is required for controlled generate later.

required_dependencies.name: Kava theme
required_dependencies.note: The deterministic Real Estate preset expects the supported theme runtime.

required_dependencies.name: JetEngine
required_dependencies.note: JetEngine provides the required Real Estate structures.

optional_dependencies.name: JetSmartFilters
optional_dependencies.note: Optional filtering enhancements can be applied when this plugin is available.

optional_dependencies.name: JetFormBuilder
optional_dependencies.note: Optional form enhancements can be applied when this plugin is available.

ownership_checks: Factory-managed content must be safe to update before controlled generate later.
User-modified generated content must be preserved or blocked before controlled generate later.
User-created unrelated content must remain untouched by the controlled generate flow.
warnings: Gate only. No site changes were made.
risks: This gate does not execute runtime dependency, ownership, or doctor checks by itself.
Controlled generate must still run runtime preflight checks before any WordPress mutation later.
post_generate_checks: open generated Home, Properties, and Contact pages
